problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Default. Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
